statement: In every magma, Equation 2557 (`x = (y * ((y * z) * y)) * w`) implies Equation 4158 (`x * y = ((y * x) * y) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0557
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op y z) y)) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op (op y x) y) y)
